theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

narrative.summary: Micron: 정량 종합 69점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 64 / 중기 68 / 장기 72. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 과열
overheat.guidance: 조정(10~15% 하락) 기다리는 게 안전. 지금은 관망.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 9.1% → 2-ATR 손절폭 18.1%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 1개 시그널 합류 — 주봉 50MA. 현재가 대비 +68.5% 위치.
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $382.2 아래 손절가 $217.1 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

top_news.title: Oil Holds Gain as Traders Weigh Hormuz Flows After Ship Attack
top_news.summary: Oil held the bulk of a gain after a cargo ship was attacked in the Strait of Hormuz, renewing concerns about safe passage through the crucial waterway following a recent uptick in transits.

top_news.title: The Close 6/25/2026
top_news.summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Citi Wealth Head of Portfolio Construction & Analytics Olaolu Aganga, Moderna CEO Stéphane Bancel, 248 Ventures Chief Investment Strategist Lindsey Bell, JPMorgan Asset Management Global Market Strategist Stephanie Aliaga, Fundstrat Global Advisors Head of Technical Strategy Mark Newton, Tenstorrent CEO Jim Keller, HB Fuller

top_news.title: Wall Street Embraces the Dollar as Warsh’s Fed Activates Bulls
top_news.summary: The dollar is wrapping up one of its best months in a year as a raft of Wall Street banks see a turnaround of fortunes for the US currency.

top_news.title: South Korea’s ‘Ant’ Army Is Driving an AI Market Frenzy
top_news.summary: Some 14 million retail investors are piling into shares of two big tech giants, but worries are growing about what happens if chip demand dries up.

top_news.title: Apple Prices Climb and the AI Trade Roars Back | Open Interest 6/25/2026
top_news.summary:
Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest."The AI trade is roaring back after Micron’s blowout forecast. JPMorgan shakes up succession plans for Jamie Dimon. Ford CEO Jim Farley weighs in on AI versus experience, and Apple raises prices as the chip shortage hits. Plus, Bob Sloan on market positioning risks and Adam Hetts on why earnings still matter.  Correct: Ford is aiming to cut $1 billion in costs this year. 
The caption has been upda

top_news.title: Trump-Backed Golf Resort Advances as Vietnam Seizes Farmland
top_news.summary: Eviction notices have been sent to farmers in northern Vietnam to make way for a $1.5 billion Trump Organization-branded luxury golf resort project that’s already behind schedule.

top_news.title: UK’s Crown Estate Profits Fall as Offshore Wind Fees Decline
top_news.summary: Profits at the Crown Estate, the property company that generates income for King Charles III, fell last year as a temporary boost from the licensing of new offshore wind farms began to fade.

top_news.title: Stocks Whipsaw as Micron Surges While Apple Sinks: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: A renewed wave of tech volatility gripped Wall Street, with a selloff in megacaps tempering optimism in other corners of the stock market that were buoyed by signs the economy is in good shape.

top_news.title: Down Jones Up, S&P 500 and Nasdaq Down | Closing Bell
top_news.summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: US Airline Stocks Erase Pandemic Losses as Oil Prices Ease
top_news.summary: A popular gauge of the US airline industry has finally recovered from pandemic-era losses after six years, as progress on a peace deal between US and Iran pushed oil prices lower and eased the pressure on carriers’ profitability.
